description: Lock distillation_for_alcoholic_spirits to fermented alcohol plus distillation, with apparatus materials upstream.

checks.reason: The date remains a broad medieval anchor for distilled beverage spirits rather than a claim about all distillation.
Distilled spirits are defined by distillation that concentrates fermented ethanol.
Fermentation produces the ethanol-bearing liquid that is distilled into spirits.
Glassmaking is apparatus-material ancestry already represented through distillation_advanced.
Pottery is vessel ancestry for upstream fermentation/distillation, not a direct spirits prerequisite.
